Title: Valid login returns token
Test Steps:
1. Send POST to /auth/login with valid credentials
2. Check response status
3. Verify response body contains token
Expected Result: 200 status; response body contains non-empty token string

Title: Invalid credentials returns error
Test Steps:
1. Send POST to /auth/login with wrong credentials
2. Check response status
3. Verify no token in body
Expected Result: 200 status; body contains error message (e.g. "Invalid credentials"); no token returned

Title: Empty credentials returns error
Test Steps:
1. Send POST to /auth/login with empty body {}
2. Check response
Expected Result: Error response with no token; status 200 with error message or 400

Title: GET all bookings for room returns array
Test Steps:
1. Send GET /booking?roomid={id} with token
2. Verify status 200
3. Verify body contains bookings array
Expected Result: 200 status; body has bookings array; each item has bookingid, roomid, firstname, lastname

Title: POST valid booking returns created booking
Test Steps:
1. Send POST /booking with full valid payload
2. Verify 201 status
3. Verify bookingid returned
4. Verify all fields match
Test Data: roomid: 1, firstname: Test, lastname: QA, depositpaid: true, checkin: future date, checkout: future+3
Expected Result: 201 status; body includes bookingid; firstname, lastname, roomid, depositpaid, bookingdates match input

Title: POST booking with missing firstname returns validation error
Test Steps:
1. Send POST /booking without firstname field
2. Verify error response
Expected Result: 400 or error response; body contains validation error mentioning firstname

Title: POST booking with checkin after checkout returns error
Test Steps:
1. Send POST /booking with checkin date after checkout
2. Verify error response
Expected Result: Error response; booking not created; body has error message

Title: PUT booking without token returns 401/403
Test Steps:
1. Send PUT /booking/{id} without auth token
2. Verify rejection
Test Data: Valid booking payload but no Cookie header
Expected Result: 401 or 403 status; booking not modified

Title: DELETE booking with token then GET returns 404
Test Steps:
1. Send DELETE /booking/{id} with token
2. Verify success
3. Send GET /booking/{id}
4. Verify 404
Expected Result: DELETE returns 200/201; subsequent GET returns 404

Title: GET all rooms returns room list
Test Steps:
1. Send GET /room
2. Verify 200 status
3. Verify rooms array with expected fields
Expected Result: 200 status; body has rooms array; each room has roomid, roomName, type, roomPrice

Title: POST room without token returns 401/403
Test Steps:
1. Send POST /room with valid room data but no token
2. Verify rejection
Test Data: Valid room payload but no Cookie header
Expected Result: 401 or 403 status; room not created

Title: Guest sends message and admin reads it
Test Steps:
1. POST /message with valid data (no auth)
2. GET /message with admin token
3. Find the created message
4. GET /message/{id} with token
Test Data: name: User123, email: user@example.com, phone: 12345678901, subject: Inquiry, description: message text
Expected Result: POST returns 200; GET list includes message; GET by id returns full message details

Title: GET branding returns site info
Test Steps:
1. Send GET /branding
2. Verify 200
3. Verify name and description fields present
Expected Result: 200 status; body has name, description, logoUrl, map fields

Title: PUT branding without token returns 401/403
Test Steps:
1. Send PUT /branding with new name but no token
2. Verify rejection
Test Data: name: Unauthorized Update, no Cookie header
Expected Result: 401 or 403 status; branding not modified

Title: Homepage loads with banner and rooms
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to homepage
2. Verify welcome banner visible
3. Verify room listings displayed
4. Verify room images rendered
Expected Result: Welcome banner is visible; at least one room card with image is displayed

Title: Happy path booking flow
Test Steps:
1. Click Book this room
2. Select dates via calendar drag
3. Fill firstname lastname email phone
4. Click Book
5. Verify success message
Test Data: firstname: Test, lastname: Automation, email: test@example.com, phone: 12345678901
Expected Result: Booking Successful banner/modal is displayed

Title: Empty booking form shows validation errors
Test Steps:
1. Open booking form
2. Select dates
3. Submit without filling any fields
4. Verify errors appear
Expected Result: Validation errors displayed for all required fields (firstname, lastname, email, phone)

Title: Valid contact form submission
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to contact form
2. Fill name email phone subject message
3. Click Submit
4. Verify success
Test Data: name: John Doe, email: john@example.com, phone: 12345678901, subject: Inquiry, message: Hello
Expected Result: Success message 'Thanks for getting in touch' is displayed

Title: Empty contact form shows validation errors
Test Steps:
1. Click Submit without filling any fields
2. Verify validation errors
Expected Result: Validation errors visible on all required fields

Title: Valid admin login shows dashboard
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /admin
2. Enter admin / password
3. Click Login
4. Verify dashboard loads
Expected Result: Dashboard visible with Logout button, room creation form, and room list

Title: Invalid admin login shows error
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /admin
2. Enter wrong credentials
3. Click Login
4. Verify error shown
Expected Result: Error message displayed; no redirect to dashboard

Title: Create room via admin panel
Test Steps:
1. Fill room name type price accessible
2. Click Create
3. Verify room appears in list
Test Data: name: TestRoom, type: Double, accessible: true, price: 175
Expected Result: Room row appears in room listing with correct details

Title: Delete room via admin panel
Preconditions: Logged in as admin; room exists
Test Steps:
1. Find room in list
2. Click delete button
3. Verify room removed from list
Expected Result: Room no longer appears in the room listing

Title: Logout clears session and redirects to login
Test Steps:
1. Click Logout
2. Verify login page shown
3. Navigate to /admin
4. Verify login page (not dashboard)
Expected Result: After logout login form is shown; direct /admin access shows login not dashboard

Title: Admin login with empty fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /admin
2. Click Login without entering credentials
3. Check for validation
Expected Result: Validation error shown or login page remains with no redirect
